name: HtmlTemplate
template:
Final Result is $result
This is an email generated by velocity

name: PostgresDDLTemplate
template:
#if($idDataType == 'Long')
CREATE SEQUENCE public.$sequenceName
  INCREMENT 1
  MINVALUE 1
  MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807
  START 1
  CACHE 1;
ALTER TABLE public.$sequenceName
  OWNER TO $account;
#end

CREATE TABLE public.$tableName
(
#foreach( $column in $columns )
	#if($column.name == 'id')
		#if($idDataType == 'Long')
		id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('$sequenceName'::regclass),
		#else
		id character varying NOT NULL,
		#end
	#else
	$column.name $column.col_type $column.nullable,
	#end
#end
	CONSTRAINT ${tableName}_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
)
WITH (
  OIDS=FALSE
);
ALTER TABLE public.$tableName
  OWNER TO $account;

#foreach( $index in $indexes )
	#if($index.unique)
		CREATE UNIQUE INDEX $index.name
  		ON public.$tableName
  		USING btree
  		($index.fields);
	#else
		CREATE INDEX $index.name
  		ON public.$tableName
  		USING btree
  		($index.fields);
	#end
#end

name: RegisterTemplate
template:
things-system mailing service

$title

  • Domain : $domain
  • Name : $name
  • E-Mail : $email
#if($approvalLink && $rejectLink) Approval
Reject #end #if($link) URL Link #end #if($initPassLink) Initialize the password #end #if($activeLink) Active Account #end

name: InitPassTemplate
template:
things-system mailing service

$title

  • Domain : $domain
  • Name : $name
  • E-Mail : $email
#if($password) Your password was initialized.

password : $password

#end #if($initPassLink) Initialize the password

#end Thank you.
